steps.title: Identify the initial deposit on the graph
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance at month $0$ — that is, the $y$-intercept of $y = f(x)$. Read off the value where the graph crosses the vertical axis.

steps.title: Read the y-intercept
steps.content:
The graph crosses the $y$-axis at approximately $30$ dollars, so the initial deposit was about $\$30$.

The answer is 30.
